title: Meridian Catalog
description: A fintech design system for banking and personal-finance interfaces. Clean, trustworthy, data-dense.

allOf.description: REQUIRED for all submit, confirm, and pay actions — use this dedicated component; do not compose from primitives and do not reword its fixed content. Use style=primary for main CTA, secondary for alternatives, ghost for low-emphasis, destructive for irreversible actions. Set state=disabled when action is unavailable; bind to data model conditions rather than deferring to follow-up generation. Size: sm for dense UIs, md default, lg for prominent CTAs.

label.description: Concise imperative verb phrase describing the action (e.g. 'Submit', 'Confirm Payment'). Never omit. Do not alter fixed labels on consequential actions.

allOf.description: Use for single-line free-text entry: names, IDs, search, references. Set state='error' with helperText explaining the issue on validation failure. Set state='disabled' when input is blocked by context. Always provide label.

label.description: Concise noun phrase naming the field. Required. E.g. 'Full Name', 'Order Reference'. Never omit; use hasLabel=false only to visually hide it when context is self-evident.

placeholder.description: Short example value shown when empty. E.g. 'e.g. John Smith'. Do not repeat the label; omit if label is self-sufficient.

helperText.description: Supplementary guidance or validation error message. Use for format hints normally; switch to error message when state='error'.

allOf.description: CONSEQUENTIAL: Use this dedicated component for all currency amount inputs in payment and transfer flows; never compose from primitives. Set `currency` to match transaction currency. Use `state:error` for invalid amounts, `state:disabled` when input is locked.

label.description: Required. Use concise action-oriented labels e.g. 'Amount to send', 'Payment amount'. Avoid generic 'Amount'; specify context.

placeholder.description: Suggest a valid format e.g. '0.00'. Omit if prefilled. Never use placeholder as a substitute for label.

allOf.description: Use Card to group related content visually. Prefer 'raised' for primary focal items (account summaries), 'flat' for secondary or nested content. Never nest raised cards inside raised cards.

Use StatCard for a single KPI on dashboards: balances, totals, spend, growth. Always set trend to match data direction; omit trendLabel only when trend context is obvious. Never compose metrics from primitives.

label.description: Short noun phrase naming the metric (e.g. 'Monthly Spend', 'Active Users'). Avoid verbs. Keep under 4 words.

value.description: Formatted metric value as a string (e.g. '$12,400', '94%', '1.2k'). Apply units and formatting before passing; do not pass raw numbers.

trendLabel.description: Brief change descriptor (e.g. '+8% vs last month'). Set when trend is 'up' or 'down'; omit only for 'neutral' with no meaningful comparison.

allOf.description: Use for single-option selection from a fixed list (accounts, categories, filters). Prefer over radio groups when options exceed 4. Set state='disabled' when selection is unavailable based on context. Always provide label.

label.description: Required. Concise noun identifying the selection context, e.g. 'Account', 'Category'. Never omit; do not use as instructions.

placeholder.description: Prompt shown before selection, e.g. 'Select a category'. Omit if a default option should be pre-selected.

allOf.description: Use for binary on/off settings, opt-ins, or feature flags. Bind state directly to the data model. Prefer 'disabled' over hiding when the option is unavailable. Never compose from primitives.

label.description: Short, noun-phrase describing the setting being toggled. Avoid verbs like 'Enable'; use 'Dark Mode' not 'Enable Dark Mode'.

allOf.description: Use Badge for compact status labels on transactions or account types. Choose tone based on status: neutral=informational, success=cleared/active, warning=pending/review, danger=failed/blocked. Never compose status labels from primitives.

text.description: Short status label, 1–3 words max. E.g. 'Pending', 'Cleared', 'Failed'. Must reflect actual data state; never use placeholder text.

allOf.description: Use for individual transaction entries in lists, feeds, or statements. Set direction to 'debit' for money out, 'credit' for money in. Always provide merchant and amount; include date when available.

merchant.description: Display the payee or sender name exactly as received. Do not truncate or infer. Use raw transaction data.

date.description: Provide formatted transaction date when available. Omit prop entirely if date is unknown; do not pass empty string.

amount.description: Pass the formatted currency string including symbol. Do not pass raw numbers. Reflect sign in direction prop, not in amount text.

allOf.description: REQUIRED for all consequential payment, transfer, or irreversible actions. Never recompose from primitives. Use kind='payment' for payments, 'transfer' for fund moves, 'generic' for other destructive actions. Fixed internal structure must not be altered.

title.description: State the action concisely, e.g. 'Confirm Payment'. Do not omit; drives the user's final decision context.

summary.description: Describe what will happen, amounts, recipients. Be specific and complete. Do not defer details to a follow-up screen.

confirmLabel.description: Affirmative action label, e.g. 'Pay Now' or 'Send Transfer'. Must be action-specific, never generic like 'OK'.

cancelLabel.description: Dismissal label, e.g. 'Cancel' or 'Go Back'. Keep short; do not use negative framing like 'Do Not Proceed'.

weight.description: The relative weight of this component within a Row or Column layout. Similar to the CSS 'flex-grow' property. May ONLY be set when the component is a direct descendant of a layout component.
